Data.Description: Manage UiPath automation packages (.nupkg) in the Orchestrator feed. Packages are uploaded code artifacts. Use 'processes' to manage runnable process bindings in folders.

Subcommands.Name: list [options]
Subcommands.Description: List all automation packages in the feed. Returns package key (format: PackageId:Version), title, version, and metadata. Use --search to filter by name. No folder context needed — packages are tenant-scoped.

Subcommands.Name: get [options] <key>
Subcommands.Description: Get a specific package version by key. The key format is 'PackageId:Version' (e.g., 'MyProcess:1.0.0'). Returns metadata, target framework, authors, and release notes.

Subcommands.Name: versions [options] <package-id>
Subcommands.Description: List all available versions of a package. Use this to find specific versions before creating a process with 'processes create --package-version'.

Subcommands.Name: entry-points [options] <key>
Subcommands.Description: List all workflow entry points in a package. Each entry point has a path, display name, and input/output argument schemas. Use the entry point path with 'processes create --entry-point' for multi-entry-point packages.

Subcommands.Name: upload [options] <file>
Subcommands.Description: Upload a .nupkg automation package to the Orchestrator feed. After upload, use 'processes create' to bind the package to a folder for execution.

Subcommands.Name: download [options] <key>
Subcommands.Description: Download a .nupkg automation package from the Orchestrator feed. The key format is 'PackageId:Version' (e.g., 'MyProcess:1.0.0'). Use 'packages list' or 'packages versions' to find the key.

GlobalOptions.Description: Write logs to file instead of stderr
